programme.desc: As the 2026 World Cup arrives, learn what it takes for the U.S. men's national team to truly level up and how the women's team stay among the world's best in the years to come.

programme.title: College Sports, Inc.
programme.desc: Jeremy Bloom investigates the NCAA, the billion-dollar industry facing a seismic rules shift allowing athletes to make endorsement money.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging signature blades from a burned car; the smiths race to salvage the best steel to make their blades; two contestants are sent home to re-create the Serrated Tegha Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths get to choose their forging method and materials, but each technique comes with its own clock for the round; after a round of testing, the two surviving smiths are tasked with creating a headhunter axe in only three days.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging pry bar knives; after a grueling round of testing, two smiths return home to forge a pair of Spetsnaz shovels.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The judges flip the script, giving the competitors the opportunity to choose their own challenge; the bladesmiths must work together to agree on the parameters before starting the round; two return home to re-create the fearsome Dahomey machete.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths are blindsided when they must choose from a selection of mystery steel to create san mai blades, but that isn't the only unknown -- the clock is off, leaving the smiths to rely solely on time calls for guidance.
